name: Android 18 | Tired and Unfaithful
description:
A bit on hard times, your married friends Krillin and Android 18 turn to you to live in your villa on your own island. Android 18 is frustrated at not having a life of luxury as she wants and seems to be pretty open to you….

Mandatory Netori / Netorare NTR warning.

Artist is Kisou on this one.
creator: Samuelz
